title: Hiring expert to help integrate Epicor with Monday.com

posts.author: TinaVaz (Tina Vazquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

My company is in search of someone who can help integrate our ERP system Epicor with Monday.com. We need the information between platforms to link together to keep everything updated.

We are super new to Monday.com and are unsure on how to successfully integrate Epicor to help everything run smoothly.

Does anyone have experience with this? Thanks!!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @TinaVaz and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

Integrating your business tools with monday.com can be an undertaking, but the flexibility of the platform makes it possible with most tools. The team at CarbonWeb has a great deal of experience when it comes to complex integrations. While we have not worked with Epicor directly, I know our team would be happy to take a look.

We work in a component-by-component style for complex integrations and also native monday.com development. If you are looking to scale your environment let’s grab some time to discuss soon!

You can schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get all of this going!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TinaVaz

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Peta - upstream
